description_long: This object depicts a group of three detached single-family houses arranged side by side on a rectangular grassy plot. Each house features a pitched roof, with the central house having a prominent front porch and steps leading up to the main entryway. The houses are separated by narrow driveways, with the central house's driveway curving toward a black paved path. The leftmost house has a garage attached, while the rightmost house features a large covered porch area. The exterior walls are rendered in a light color, and the roofs are uniformly sloped. The overall setting suggests a suburban neighborhood layout with clear property boundaries and open lawns.
description: A trio of detached, pitched-roof houses on a grassy rectangular lot, each with distinct driveways and porches, evoking a suburban neighborhood.
description_view_0: Front view showing three houses side by side, with the central house's porch and steps most prominent.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the houses, driveways, and the black paved path leading to the central house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back porches and the open lawn area behind the houses.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the rightmost house's large covered porch and the separation between the houses.
attribute_entryway_design: Central house features a covered porch with steps, while the others have simple entryways; all have minimal decorative elements.
